command:
echo "=== SAKURA CONFIG + WEBHOOK ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 '
grep -E "model|telegram|webhook|require_mention|mode|ollama|base_url" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -25
echo "--- telegram webhook check ---"
BOT_TOKEN=$(grep -r "bot_token" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -1 | awk -F: "{print $2}" | tr -d " ")
echo "token_found: $BOT_TOKEN"
echo "--- last 20 log lines ---"
tail -20 $(ls -t /home/jose/.hermes/logs/*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) 2>/dev/null
echo "--- cloudflared ---"
systemctl is-active cloudflared
' 2>&1

echo "=== REMY CONFIG ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 '
echo "--- all services running ---"
systemctl list-units --state=running --type=service 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$" | grep -v "UNIT" | awk "{print $1}" | head -15
echo "--- openclaw service files ---"
find /etc/systemd /home/jose -name "*.service" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "openclaw\|9119\|remy" 2>/dev/null
echo "--- is openclaw npm installed ---"
ls /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i claw
ls /home/jose/.npm-global/bin/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i claw
echo "--- .openclaw config ---"
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open(\"/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json\")); [print(k,\":\",v) for k,v in d.items() if k not in [\"token\",\"apiKey\",\"botToken\",\"secret\"]]" 2>/dev/null || echo "config read failed"
echo "--- nginx config ---"
cat /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/* 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "--- cloudflared ---"
systemctl is-active cloudflared
' 2>&1
